# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/envoy_admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: admin_listener
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 9901
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: admin_hcm
                route_config:
                  name: admin_routes
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: admin_vhost
                      domains: ["*"]
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/healthz"
                          direct_response:
                            status: 200
                            body:
                              inline_string: "ok\n"
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/stats"
                          direct_response:
                            status: 200
                            body:
                              inline_string: "stats endpoint\n"
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          direct_response:
                            status: 200
                            body:
                              inline_string: "envoy admin\n"
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters: []

layered_runtime:
  layers:
    - name: static_layer
      static_layer:
        envoy:
          resource_monitors:
            fixed_heap:
              max_heap_size_bytes: 2147483648

stats_config:
  use_all_default_tags: true
  stats_tags:
    - tag_name: envoy.cluster_name
      regex: "^cluster\\.((.+?)\\.)"
    - tag_name: envoy.listener_address
      regex: "^listener\\.((.+?)\\.)"

overload_manager:
  refresh_interval: 0.25s
  resource_monitors:
    - name: envoy.resource_monitors.fixed_heap
      typed_config:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.resource_monitors.fixed_heap.v3.FixedHeapConfig
        max_heap_size_bytes: 2147483648
  actions:
    - name: envoy.overload_actions.shrink_heap
      triggers:
        - name: envoy.resource_monitors.fixed_heap
          scaled: 0.95

node:
  id: edge-proxy
  cluster: edge-proxy-cluster
